duplicateNotice: This report may be a duplicate{ofReport}.

viewers.manyOthers: {firstName} and {count} others are viewing this report

duplicateOfAnother: This report may be a duplicate of another.
duplicateOfSpecific: This report may be a duplicate of {reportNumber}.

toolbar.searchAria: Search reports by name, location, or number

emptyStates.noReportsYet: No reports yet. Share the Chisto app or reporting link with citizens to get started.
emptyStates.noFilterMatch: No reports match the selected filter.
emptyStates.searchHint: Try a different search term or clear the search.

confirmList.approveDescription: Approve "{name}" and move it to approved state?

submitted.title: Submitted
submitted.body: Submission time is recorded when the citizen completes and sends the report. All timestamps use the server timezone for consistency across moderators and audit logs.

reporter.title: Reporter
reporter.body: Reporter identity is anonymized to protect privacy. The alias shown is used for moderation traceability only. Personal details are not visible to moderators.

coReporters.title: Also reported by
coReporters.body: Multiple citizens reported this same issue. Co-reported issues may indicate higher urgency or community concern. Each co-reporter contributes to the report's visibility in the moderation queue.

trustTier.title: Trust tier
trustTier.body: Trust tiers (Bronze, Silver, Gold) reflect the reporter's verification history and past report quality. Higher tiers indicate more established, verified contributors. This helps moderators gauge report reliability.

queue.title: Queue
queue.body: Reports are organized into queues by urgency, type, or workflow stage. Queues help moderators focus on the right batch and ensure SLA targets are met. This report is in the {value} work stream.

operationalContext.title: Operational context
operationalContext.assignedModeratorDesc: The staff member currently responsible for reviewing this report. Admins can assign from the picker below; anyone with moderate access can claim with Assign to me or release when handing off.
operationalContext.slaDesc: Service Level Agreement: the time remaining before a response or decision is expected.
operationalContext.queueDesc: The work stream or category this report belongs to.
operationalContext.reassignHint: Currently assigned to {name}. Reassign by releasing then claiming, or contact an admin.
operationalContext.confirmUnassignDescription: Clear the assigned moderator for this report?

moderationActions.title: Moderation actions
moderationActions.lifecycleComplete: No further actions available. The lifecycle for this report is complete.
moderationActions.hint: Apply an explicit decision and keep the lifecycle clean. Every action writes a timeline entry.
moderationActions.shortcutHint: Tip: use Arrow keys to move between actions.

evidence.title: Evidence
evidence.empty: No evidence files were attached to this report.

timeline.empty: Timeline entries will appear as moderation actions are performed.
timeline.approvedDetail: Moderator accepted the report and moved it to approved lifecycle state.
timeline.rejectedDetail: Report was rejected and marked as removed.
timeline.rejectedDetailWithReason: Report was rejected and marked as removed. Reason: {reason}
timeline.inReviewDetail: Report status moved to in-review for deeper moderation checks.

rejectionReasons.label: Rejection reason
rejectionReasons.notesPlaceholder: Add optional context for audit trail

confirm.approvalDescription: Approve this report and move it to the approved lifecycle state?
confirm.rejectionDescription: Reject this report. A rejection reason is required for moderation traceability.
confirm.statusUpdateDescription: Move this report into in-review status for deeper moderation checks?
confirm.concurrentViewersWarning: {count, plural, one {1 other moderator is viewing this report right now. Proceed only if you have coordinated.} other {# other moderators are viewing this report right now. Proceed only if you have coordinated.}}

toast.approvedMessage: This report has been accepted successfully.
toast.inReviewMessage: This report is now marked as in review.
toast.rejectedMessage: This report has been rejected and marked removed.
toast.rejectedWithReasonMessage: This report has been rejected. Reason: {reason}

duplicates.empty: No duplicate report groups are currently waiting for moderation.
duplicates.selectGroupEmpty: Select a duplicate group to review and merge.
duplicates.confirmMergeDescription: This will approve the primary report, merge selected child evidence and co-reporters, then close selected child reports as merged duplicates.
duplicates.mergeReasonPlaceholder: Add optional merge context for the audit trail

toast.noSelectionMessage: Select at least one duplicate report before merging.
toast.groupChangedMessage: Another moderator may have updated this group. The list was refreshed. Review and try again.
toast.groupChangedRefreshMessage: This duplicate group changed. Refresh the page and try again.
toast.mergeFailedMessage: Unable to merge duplicate reports right now.

pageDescription: Review and moderate citizen pollution reports.
